description: A horizontal full-color candid photograph taken at what appears to be a White House indoor event (gold drapery, chandelier, and a row of American/state flags in the background). Donald Trump, seen from behind in a dark navy suit, reaches out to shake hands with a smiling, laughing coal miner. The miners are dressed in gray work coveralls/jackets with reflective yellow safety striping and an American-flag patch, and most wear white or dark mining hard hats (several visibly branded 'CORE') with headlamps. A large group of miners surrounds the scene, smiling. There is no on-image graphic text, headline, slogan or logo overlay; this is a documentary event photograph, not a designed meme. The accompanying tweet marks National Miners Day, calling miners 'American heroes' who 'keep the lights on,' and ending 'May God bless our miners!'
notable_text: (no on-image text; some hard hats branded 'CORE')
